data.name: Sex City
data.detailed_description:
Sex City is a simulation game whose ultimate goal is to give you pleasure!



Choose one of 24 and start undressing her! With the help of a very entertaining puzzle, you will build a city and along the way, earning a population - the girl will undress in front of you. Become the best builder and simultaneously undress the entire female sex of this depraved city!

Game Features:
* 24 unique girls;
* Each girl has her own level of difficulty, depending on the number of clothes on her;
* An entertaining and relaxing puzzle;
* Gallery, where you can see all previously opened girls;
* Naked girls;

data.short_description: A city that will cheer you up! And in fact, not only the mood. In this game, control takes only one hand!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 簡體中文*, 俄文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 匈牙利文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® XP / Vista / 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 128 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with DirectX 8.1
  • 儲存空間: 60 MB 可用空間
